title: Fast Local Feedback, Hooks, and Developer Experience · Failure Case: Hook Scope
summary: Create fast local gates that match CI without blocking ordinary iteration. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates hook scope increment in a one-command local verification workflow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Run fast deterministic changed-file checks in local hooks and keep heavier checks elsewhere.
Expose stable format, lint, type, test, and verify commands independent of tool internals.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
